snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äď our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Reacting to Luka Doncic saying 'you can't compare me to Larry Bird' | The Jump
snippet.description:
Rachel Nichols, Richard Jefferson and Matt Barnes discuss Dallas Mavericks star Luka Doncic saying "you can't compare me to Larry Bird."

0:00 Rachel replays her interview when Luka shrugged off Bird comparisons.
0:52 Matt disagrees with Luka.
1:27 Richard thinks Luka was right to say what he said.

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Emanet 134. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 134 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Why Some Supercars Take More Than Money To Buy
snippet.description:
Thank you to Raycon for sponsoring today‚Äôs video! To get premium audio in your life, go to https://buyraycon.com/donut for 15% off your order!

Supercars are some of the most exclusive cars in the world, with pricetags often in the hundred of thousands if not millions of dollars. Find out which brands are the "easiest" to buy, does Ferrari have a secret buyers list, and how to buy a hypercar before its even announced!

snippet.description:
ŇĹarko Hrgińá i Zenice neobińćan je po svemu. Dvanaest godina Ňĺivi u Ň°pilji uz Babinu rijeku  bez struje i vode. Nikada vatru nije naloŇĺio, nikada se nije razbolio a jedan od njegovih recepata je Ňĺivot bez ńćarapa na nogama. Umjesto ńćarapa ŇĹarko noge oblaŇĺe prvo papirom od vreńáa za braŇ°no a zatim sve to obloŇĺi najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuńáa na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu ŇĹare ne nosi ńćarape. Pogledajte video koji smo snimili kod kontejnera za otpad koje ŇĹarko svakodnevno posjeńáuje.

snippet.title: POLKAHOLIKI - BELA ROŇĹA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
POLKAHOLIKI pońćinju 2021. godinu sa svojim prvim valcerom! Ma da je veńá u imenu Polkaholiki jasno da im je polka najdraŇĺa, takońĎer oboŇĺavaju i valcere. BIJELA RUŇĹA je pjesma o ljubavi, ńćekanju, nadi... Pravi romantińćni glazbeni film sa dvoje zaljubljenih!

SI: POLKAHOLIKI zańćenjajo leto s prvim VALńĆKOM! ńĆeprav so POLKAholiki, oboŇĺujejo vso narodnozabavno glasbo! BELA ROŇĹA, pesem o ljubezni, ńćakanju in upanju, romantińćna zgodba o dveh zaljubljencih, je tu!  

LYRICS ūüáłūüáģ

Gledam za tabo, Ň°tejem korake,
zdaj si le pika daleńć stran.
Solze velike, nikdar enake,
a mi bo pesem krajŇ°ala dan.

Vse sva imela, veńć si hotela,
sreńćo iskala boŇ° drugje,
jaz pa Ň°e upam, nate Ň°e ńćakam,
Ň°e verjamem v ńćudeŇĺe.

BELA ROŇĹA BO CVETELA
VSE DOKLER NE BOŇ† NAZAJ,
BELA ROŇĹA, DA ME SPOMNI
NA NAJLEPŇ†I NAJIN MAJ.

Ň†E CVETI IN NE OVENE,
LE ODPADE KAKŇ†EN CVET,
BELA ROŇĹA ZA SPOMINE,
DA ME VRNE K TEBI SPET.

ŇĹalost je laŇĺja, vńćasih izgine,
kadar si laŇĺem, da mi gre.
A tvoja koŇĺa, mehka kot svila,
je predaleńć, daleńć je.

Hodim po poti, kot da si z mano,
upanje pa Ň°e tiho tli.
Ko enkrat ljubiŇ°, pańć ne pozabiŇ°,
to ostane, ne zbledi.

LYRICS ūüá≠ūüá∑

Gledam za tobom, brojim korake,
sada si samo tońćka daleko od mene. 
Suze velike, nikad iste,
a pjesma mi je skratila dan.

Sve smo imali, htjela si viŇ°e,
sreńáu ńáeŇ° traŇĺiti drugdje,
a ja se joŇ° nadam, tebe joŇ° ńćekam,
joŇ° vjerujem u ńćuda.

BIJELA RUŇĹA ńÜE PROCVIJETATI
SVE DOK SE NE VRATIŇ† NAZAD
BIJELA RUŇĹA, DA ME PODSJETI
NA NAJLJEPŇ†I NAŇ† SVIBANJ.

JOŇ† CVIJETA I NE VENE,
OTPADA SAMO PO KOJI CVIJET.
BIJELA RUŇĹA ZA USPOMENE,
DA ME VRATI TEBI OPET.

Tuga je lakŇ°a, ponekad nestane
kad si laŇĺem, da mi ide.
Ali tvoja koŇĺa, mekana kao  svila,
predaleko je, daleko je.

Hodam po putu, kao da si sa mnom, 
nada joŇ° tiho tinja
Kad jednom voliŇ°, ne zaboraviŇ°,
to ostaje, ne blijedi.


Music: Raay // Lyrics: Rok Lunańćek & Maja Kvertkov // music production: M-MEDIA, SodraŇĺica 2021 // glazbena producenta: Tadej Mihelińć & Raay // video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 // Executive producer: Raay

snippet.title: Game Recap: Mavericks 115, Spurs 104
snippet.description: Luka Doncic recorded 22 points, 12 rebounds and 12 assists for the Mavericks as they defeated the Spurs, 115-104. Additionally for the Mavericks, Kristaps Porzingis added 28 points and a season-high 14 rebounds in the victory, while DeMar DeRozan tallied 30 points, 11 assists and four steals for the Spurs in the losing effort. The Mavericks improve to 19-16 on the season, while the Spurs fall to 18-15.

Well with it being a BMW M, we need to start with performance‚Ä¶ And we can assure you that the new M3 & M4 do NOT disappoint! With a 3-litre straight-six turbo, they can put down a whopping 510hp and 650Nm, while it can easily shoot you to 60mph in under 4 seconds!

But of course, we know you‚Äôre probably still not happy with that new grille. But let‚Äôs be honest, given it was announced so long ago, aren‚Äôt we all kind of used to it now? Or are you still so disappointed you can‚Äôt bear to look yet?

snippet.title: Emanet 130. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 130 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet

snippet.title: NASA‚ÄôS Perseverance Rover‚Äôs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASA‚Äôs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the rover‚Äôs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or ‚Äúhead‚ÄĚ) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on Mars‚Äô Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: I'm back.
snippet.description:
Schlatt moves to Texas. Texas starts snowing. Life is suffering.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Schlatt is in Texas and Texas is in Schlatt but I wish it was 10 Big Hot Men in me instead. Hello from the deep south! In this commentary video Schlatt talks about stuff for 8 minutes and change, which is just long enough to pollute the video with multiple midroll ads to make as much money as possible. He talks about the awful Texas Snowstorm 2021, which left millions of people out of power thanks to Ercot - kind of like when Schlatt has a heart attack and perishes on the Dream SMP! I put TommyInnit in the video for half a second just so I can also include him in the description. Maybe I should've titled this Commentary Video "Minecraft's Snowstorm Mod Is Incredibly Funny," and then the thumbnail is Schlatt in a red shirt. Who Is Ranboo? I Still Don't Know. I'm old and grumpy and in Texas with my best friends Mizkif, Trainwrecks, Pokelawls, Esfand, and Marriott International. The power in my house is out but At Least I Have My Blankets. It's almost like I brought the cold weather down south with me. If only I could bring the pizza and bagels with me, too -- maybe have a good old New York Slice of Pizza Pie at my favorite New York City Bodega with New York City Mayoral Candidate Andrew "Chicken Soup" Yang. Better yet, me and Davey Pageviews go out to John's at Bleecker Street, get a 10/10 and then day trade some no-name pink sheet company up 500% by closing. That's what I call a Portnoy Pump! /j /hj /ij /lh

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting 3:24 a.m. EST on Thursday, March 4 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. If needed, there are backup opportunities available at 5:42 a.m. EST on Thursday, March 4, as well as 3:03 a.m. EST and 5:21 a.m. EST on Friday, March 5.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously flew on seven missions: the Iridium-8 mission, the Telstar 18 VANTAGE mission, and five Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (ūüĒĒ ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. That‚Äôs because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it can‚Äôt easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didn‚Äôt have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didn‚Äôt prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

snippet.title: Emanet 129. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 129 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Toyota GR Yaris v Mitsubishi Evo VI - DRAG RACE *Tommi Makinen Showdown*
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an old school vs new school drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in his all-new Toyota GR Yaris, and he‚Äôs going up against Yianni in the Mitsubishi Evo VI Tommi Makinen Edition! And even if there‚Äôs 20 years between these two competitors, they‚Äôre actually more closely matched than you may think‚Ä¶

First up we have the GR Yaris. Powered by a 1.6-litre 3-cylinder turbo petrol, it can produce 261hp and 360Nm, while it also comes with a 6-speed manual gearbox. As for the Evo VI? Well it has 2-litre 4-cylinder turbo petrol, which can produce 276hp and 373Nm! And of course, no surprise to hear that it‚Äôs a manual as well. 

So they're pretty similar, right? What‚Äôs more, they‚Äôre both closely connected to legendary rally driver Tommi Makinen! While the Evo VI we have here is the Tommi Makinen edition (due to him previously winning the WRC in an Evo VI), he was also Team Principal for the Toyota Gazoo Racing, a rally team currently leading the WRC!

So what do you think - an easy win for the GR Yaris? Or will the classic Evo take it? 

There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: GT-R NISMO v 911 Turbo S v R8 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

You know what time it is‚Ä¶ Time for another EPIC carwow drag race! We‚Äôve got Mat in a Nissan GT-R NISMO, and he‚Äôs going up against an Audi R8 V10 Performance & a Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

But how do they compare? First up, Mat‚Äôs GT-R NISMO is powered by a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V6 which can produce 600hp & 650Nm. The R8 alongside him has a 5.2-litre V10 with 625hp & 590Nm of torque. And then finally we have the Porsche, which has a 3.8-litre flat-six turbo to produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

So, there's one thing they have in common - they‚Äôre all absolutely awesome machines! But of course, there can only be one winner - so who‚Äôs your money on? We know how quick the 911 Turbo is, so it may be a foregone conclusion when it comes to who snatches the win... But could Mat snatch second place from Yianni in the Audi R8?

There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us their GT-R NISMO - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Game Theory: Your Shiny Pokemon is DOOMED to Die!
snippet.description:
Special thanks to Audible for sponsoring this video!
Get a FREE 30 Day trial of Audible! ‚Ėļ http://audible.com/matpat

We all love when a shiny version of our favorite Pokemon shows up, right? It is a welcome surprise to any video or card game! Except, those shinies are not as great as we all think. Don't get me wrong, they LOOK amazing but they are lacking one very important thing in the Pokemon universe. That thing, Theorists, is POWER! Shines are WEAK! Not only that, but they are DOOMED! Why? You will have to watch to find out!

hr.title: Diana ima vezu s koŇ°arkaŇ°em, ali po kojoj cijeni? | Dima ńáe se boriti za ljubav!

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

snippet.title: Is Luka Doncic or Jayson Tatum the best player to build around? Jalen Rose chooses | Get Up
snippet.description:

Jalen Rose draws comparisons between Luka Doncic and Brooklyn Nets' James Harden when he breaks down why he prefers to start an NBA franchise with the Dallas Mavericks star over Boston Celtics' Jayson Tatum.
#GetUp #NBA

11:13 Final assembly
12:54 The test
15:24 Outro

https://www.youtube.com/c/samuelkimmusic

Main mic - Sennheiser ‚Ėļ https://bhpho.to/2DsR8ec
Bendy Tripod ‚Ėļ https://bhpho.to/2FyLNb0 
Main Tripods - old second hand Manfrotto tripods no longer sold. 
Studio Light - Luxli ‚Ėļ https://bhpho.to/2N9SPav

TOOLS / MACHINES: 
CNC Mill - Tormach 1100MX ‚Ėļ https://hubs.ly/H0B8DWG0
CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ‚Ėļ https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0
CNC Lathe - Tormach 15L ‚Ėļ https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gcp0

3d Printers ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/H1Printer

Drills, drivers, grinders, saws, etc ‚Ėļ http://amzn.to/2p9SPJ3 
Mig Welder ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/MP250iWelder
Tig Welder ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/Tig200Welder
Quiet Air Compressor ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/38zVKzB
Desktop PC ‚Ėļ https://youtu.be/gSbt3LK8hCs 
Oscilloscope ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/38sOzKw
Multimeters ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/2WKwPEQ

WARNING: THESE VIDEOS ARE FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY. PERSONAL USE OF VIDEO CONTENT IS AT YOUR OWN RISK. THE HACKSMITH IS A TRAINED PROFESSIONAL WHO KNOWS EXACTLY WHAT HE'S DOING. EXCEPT WHEN HE DOESN'T. DO NOT ATTEMPT TO RECREATE OR RE-ENACT ANYTHING SHOWN IN THESE VIDEOS.

snippet.title: Fixing My Old Artwork #2
snippet.description:
Get Honey for FREE today ‚Ėł http://joinhoney.com/moriah
Honey finds coupons with the click of a button. Thanks to Honey for sponsoring! #AD

Hey guys! Today I  I dug up some more of my old, childhood artwork and chose a couple (really bad) drawings that I am going to re-do them as an adult and see if I can improve them! These are really poorly done drawings, so I do a fair amount of roasting (you've been warned ūüėā ), but remember if you are a beginner artist, it's okay to not make great art at first. In fact, even if you've been doing art for a long time (*cough* ME), it's okay if your art isn't the best. Don't fall into the trap of comparing yourself to other artists or put too much pressure on yourself. Most of us are just doing this art thing for fun. So do whatever is enjoy able for you! Okay. that's the end of my talk now ūüėā 

This is kinda similar to the "draw this again" challenges I've seen from other youtubers. I was originally going to title this "Re-doing my childhood artwork." BUT I realized this video has a super similar format to my squishy makeovers. There's an art critique section (squishy roasting) and it's all about taking something that doesn't look it's best and transforming it into something new. 

I ended up using a bunch of different media for these different drawings including watercolor, colored pencils, digital art with ipad and procreate and watercolor pencils.

Please let me know if you would like to see me do anymore videos like this and if there are any more drawings from the pile that you would like to see me redo in the future. I had a blast with this, and it would be a great way to fill my sketchbook which has been a little neglected lol.


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: First Take reacts to Blake Griffin to the Nets
snippet.description:
First Take reacts to Blake Griffin to the Nets 
Stephen A. Smith and Max Kellerman react to Blake Griffin agreeing to the veteran-minimum deal with the Brooklyn Nets after a buyout with the Detroit Pistons. 
0:00 Charly Arnolt breaks down news of Blake Griffin joining the Nets. 
0:30 Max weighs in on whether Griffin will have a big impact on the Nets' title run. 
2:15 Stephen A. says Max is "sleeping" on what Blake Griffin can bring to the table.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (360 video)
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. Watch here for a 360-degree engineer's-eye-view from inside Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory, with picture-in-picture commentary.

To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.

Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app. 2-D video available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech
